evidenceFamilies.description: Approved Builder Skills v1 architecture and trust boundaries.
Shared generated-site platform surface in the neutral base template.
Astra Guru-family manifest and representative-path evidence.
Pandit behavioral-reference evidence, excluding brand identity.
Jyoti Connect-family horoscope, consultation, shop, and blog evidence.
Jyotish Live-family marketplace, portal, booking, wallet, chat, and integration evidence.
Chani-family Western astrology, report, commerce, wallet, and chat evidence.
Audited current Builder Chat, EmDash, Project Secrets, deployment, and admin flows.
No-skill unsupported HubSpot integration baseline findings.

intents.label: Refresh homepage
intents.description: Refresh an existing homepage while preserving content, bindings, and brand inputs.
userExamples: Refresh my homepage without changing the copy.

intents.label: Create landing page
intents.description: Create a focused landing page within the existing generated-site structure.
userExamples: Create a landing page for my new consultation package.

intents.label: Apply brand theme
intents.description: Apply reusable colors, typography, spacing, and component styling from brand inputs.
userExamples: Apply my new brand palette across the site.

intents.label: Improve layout hierarchy
intents.description: Clarify page structure, emphasis, spacing, and calls to action without unnecessary decoration.
userExamples: Make this page easier to scan and keep the existing message.

intents.label: Build responsive navigation
intents.description: Build accessible desktop and mobile navigation that follows generated-site routes.
userExamples: Add a keyboard-friendly mobile menu.

intents.label: Add site search
intents.description: Add a search experience over appropriate generated-site content and routes.
userExamples: Add search for articles and services.

intents.label: Improve mobile layout
intents.description: Correct responsive layout, touch-target, and small-screen presentation issues.
userExamples: Fix the cards overflowing on small screens.

intents.label: Improve accessibility
intents.description: Improve semantics, keyboard use, focus behavior, contrast, motion, and screen-reader support.
userExamples: Audit this page for keyboard and screen-reader issues.

intents.label: Edit page copy
intents.description: Update page copy while preserving editable content bindings and release behavior.
userExamples: Rewrite the services page in a warmer voice.

intents.label: Publish content update
intents.description: Prepare and release a generated-site content change through the existing content lifecycle.
userExamples: Publish the approved About page update.

intents.label: Add blog section
intents.description: Add a structured blog listing and article experience using generated-site content patterns.
userExamples: Add a blog with category and article pages.

intents.label: Localize site
intents.description: Localize site content and navigation for an additional locale.
userExamples: Localize the public site into Hindi.

intents.label: Add language
intents.description: Add a supported language with locale-aware routes and content lifecycle handling.
userExamples: Add Marathi as a site language.

intents.label: Manage locale fallbacks
intents.description: Define safe behavior when localized content or routes are missing.
userExamples: Fall back to English when a Hindi article is missing.

intents.label: Create FAQ content
intents.description: Create useful, maintainable FAQ content and its page presentation.
aliases: write a frequently asked questions page
userExamples: Create FAQs for online consultations.

intents.label: Prepare content draft
intents.description: Review and stage a content draft for a later separate publication step without publishing automatically.
userExamples: Prepare the festival guide as a draft for editorial review.

intents.label: Upload project assets
intents.description: Add project-owned media through the governed asset manifest and storage flow.
userExamples: Upload these approved brand images to the site.

intents.label: Replace images
intents.description: Replace site images while preserving references, accessibility text, and responsive behavior.
userExamples: Replace the homepage photos with these approved images.

intents.label: Create hero image
intents.description: Create and integrate an original hero visual appropriate to the page and brand.
userExamples: Create a calm celestial hero image for the homepage.

intents.label: Optimize images
intents.description: Improve image formats, sizing, responsive delivery, and loading without visible quality loss.
userExamples: Optimize product images for mobile performance.

intents.label: Add video gallery
intents.description: Add an accessible, responsive gallery for project-approved videos.
userExamples: Add a gallery for my weekly forecast videos.

intents.label: Build media gallery
intents.description: Build a browsable image or mixed-media collection with accessible controls.
userExamples: Build a gallery for ceremony photos.

intents.label: Update icons and favicons
intents.description: Update site icons and favicons through project-owned asset references.
userExamples: Use my new symbol as the favicon and app icon.

intents.label: Audit missing assets
intents.description: Find broken, missing, or ungoverned media references and recommend repairs.
userExamples: Find every broken image on the generated site.

intents.label: Update page metadata
intents.description: Improve titles, descriptions, canonical data, and social metadata for public pages.
userExamples: Improve metadata for the consultation pages.

intents.label: Add structured data
intents.description: Add valid structured data that accurately represents visible site content.
userExamples: Add valid service structured data to this page.

intents.label: Create sitemap
intents.description: Create or repair a sitemap aligned with public routes and locale behavior.
userExamples: Create a sitemap for all public article and service pages.

intents.label: Improve internal linking
intents.description: Improve meaningful links between related public pages without creating route drift.
userExamples: Link horoscope articles to the relevant consultation pages.

intents.label: Optimize local search
intents.description: Improve locally relevant site content and structured signals without inventing business facts.
userExamples: Improve local discovery for my verified clinic locations.

intents.label: Add FAQ schema
intents.description: Add FAQ structured data only where matching questions and answers are visibly present.
userExamples: Add FAQ schema to the consultation FAQ page.

intents.label: Prepare AI answer content
intents.description: Structure authoritative page content for clear retrieval and answer-engine comprehension.
aliases: make pages easier for ai search
userExamples: Restructure this guide so key answers are easy to extract.

intents.label: Audit indexability
intents.description: Diagnose crawl, canonical, metadata, route, and indexing problems across public pages.
aliases: check why pages are not indexed
userExamples: Find why the new service pages are not discoverable.

intents.label: Add contact form
intents.description: Add an accessible validated lead form with safe server-side handling.
userExamples: Add a contact form for consultation inquiries.

intents.label: Add newsletter signup
intents.description: Add an accessible newsletter signup flow with validation and explicit consent.
userExamples: Add a newsletter signup to the footer.

intents.label: Configure conversion events
intents.description: Define privacy-aware analytics events for meaningful user outcomes.
userExamples: Track completed consultation bookings and form submissions.

intents.label: Add marketing dashboard
intents.description: Add a focused dashboard for available campaign and conversion data.
userExamples: Create a dashboard for leads, bookings, and sales.

intents.label: Create campaign page
intents.description: Create a conversion-focused campaign page with disciplined measurement.
userExamples: Create a measured landing page for the festival offer.

intents.label: Add cookie consent
intents.description: Add accessible consent controls aligned with configured analytics behavior.
userExamples: Add consent choices before optional analytics load.

intents.label: Route new leads
intents.description: Route validated lead submissions to an existing supported destination.
userExamples: Route consultation leads to the configured sales workflow.

intents.label: Improve conversion flow
intents.description: Improve a measured visitor journey while preserving consent and accessibility.
userExamples: Simplify the path from service page to completed booking.

intents.label: Add product catalog
intents.description: Add a browsable product catalog with governed product data and routes.
userExamples: Add a catalog for gemstones and ritual kits.

intents.label: Create product page
intents.description: Create a product detail page with accurate merchandising and purchase states.
userExamples: Create a product page for this certified gemstone.

intents.label: Add shopping cart
intents.description: Add persistent cart behavior with validated quantities and totals.
userExamples: Add a cart that persists for signed-in customers.

intents.label: Add wishlist
intents.description: Add customer wishlist behavior with account-aware persistence.
userExamples: Add a wishlist for signed-in shoppers.

intents.label: Add checkout
intents.description: Add a validated checkout flow with secure server-side payment boundaries.
userExamples: Add checkout for physical and digital products.

intents.label: Connect payment provider
intents.description: Connect a payment provider from its current official server-side contract.
userExamples: Connect the approved payment provider to checkout.

intents.label: Add order tracking
intents.description: Add customer-visible order history and fulfillment status.
userExamples: Let customers view order and shipment status.

intents.label: Configure fulfillment
intents.description: Configure order fulfillment states, operational views, and customer updates.
userExamples: Add packed, shipped, and delivered order states.

intents.label: Create service catalog
intents.description: Create a browsable catalog of bookable or requestable services.
userExamples: Create a catalog for readings, consultations, and pujas.

intents.label: Add booking flow
intents.description: Add an accessible service booking flow with validated availability.
userExamples: Add booking for 30-minute consultations.

intents.label: Configure availability
intents.description: Configure bookable schedules, capacity, time zones, and conflict-safe availability.
userExamples: Open weekday consultation slots in Asia/Kolkata.

intents.label: Add consultation packages
intents.description: Add priced consultation offerings with duration, scope, and booking rules.
userExamples: Add three consultation packages with different durations.

intents.label: Build advisor directory
intents.description: Build a searchable public directory of advisors and their services.
userExamples: Build an advisor directory filtered by specialty.

intents.label: Create advisor portal
intents.description: Create a protected advisor workspace for schedules, bookings, and service operations.
userExamples: Create a portal where advisors manage schedules.

intents.label: Create booking portal
intents.description: Create a protected customer area for appointments, changes, and booking history.
userExamples: Let customers view and reschedule appointments.

intents.label: Add booking reminders
intents.description: Add consent-aware transactional reminders for upcoming bookings.
userExamples: Send a reminder one day before each consultation.

intents.label: Add birth chart
intents.description: Add a server-backed natal chart experience using inspected AstrologyAPI contracts.
userExamples: Add a birth chart form and results page.

intents.label: Add transit forecast
intents.description: Add personalized transit calculations and presentation through a provider adapter.
userExamples: Add a personalized daily transit forecast.

intents.label: Add synastry
intents.description: Add a two-person synastry experience using validated provider inputs and outputs.
userExamples: Add a synastry report for two birth profiles.

intents.label: Add compatibility
intents.description: Add a compatibility experience grounded in an inspected calculation contract.
userExamples: Add compatibility results for two people.

intents.label: Add daily horoscope
intents.description: Add a daily horoscope experience using supported provider data and content handling.
userExamples: Add daily horoscope pages for all zodiac signs.

intents.label: Add daily Panchang
intents.description: Add a location- and date-aware Panchang experience without unsupported accuracy claims.
userExamples: Add a Daily Panchang for the visitor's location.

intents.label: Add numerology calculator
intents.description: Add a numerology calculator using validated inputs and an inspected provider contract.
userExamples: Add a numerology calculator for name and birth date.

intents.label: Add tarot reading
intents.description: Add an interactive tarot reading backed by a supported and inspected provider flow.
userExamples: Add a three-card tarot reading.

intents.label: Create astrology report
intents.description: Create a generated astrology report from validated provider results and explicit claims.
userExamples: Create a personalized transit report customers can revisit.

intents.label: Add astrology AI chat
intents.description: Add an astrology-focused chat experience grounded in validated chart data and safe conversational boundaries.
userExamples: Add a chat that explains the customer's saved chart.

intents.label: Add customer signup
intents.description: Add an accessible customer registration flow using supported account infrastructure.
userExamples: Add customer signup before saving readings.

intents.label: Add customer sign-in
intents.description: Add secure customer sign-in and session-aware navigation.
userExamples: Add sign-in for returning customers.

intents.label: Build account dashboard
intents.description: Build a protected customer dashboard for relevant account activity.
userExamples: Create a dashboard for readings, bookings, and orders.

intents.label: Add profile settings
intents.description: Add account settings for supported customer profile data.
userExamples: Let customers update their name and birth details.

intents.label: Add privacy controls
intents.description: Add customer controls for supported data access, consent, and deletion requests.
userExamples: Add a way to request account data deletion.

intents.label: Add customer wallet
intents.description: Add account-scoped wallet balances and transaction history with integrity controls.
userExamples: Add wallet credits customers can use for consultations.

intents.label: Add customer chat
intents.description: Add protected customer messaging with appropriate participant and retention boundaries.
userExamples: Let booked customers message their advisor.

intents.label: Add order history
intents.description: Add a protected customer view of past orders and bookings with authorization and privacy controls.
userExamples: Let signed-in customers review their past orders and bookings.

intents.label: Integrate unsupported provider
intents.description: Research and implement an unbundled vendor integration through the required server-side Project Secrets flow.
userExamples: Connect this site to a provider that is not in the catalog.

intents.label: Add outbound webhook
intents.description: Send signed, retryable server-side events to a documented external endpoint.
userExamples: Send a signed webhook when a booking is confirmed.

intents.label: Add inbound webhook
intents.description: Receive and verify documented provider callbacks with idempotent processing.
userExamples: Handle signed payment status callbacks.

intents.label: Connect CRM
intents.description: Connect lead data to a CRM using current official server-side contracts.
userExamples: Send qualified consultation leads to our CRM.

intents.label: Connect email provider
intents.description: Connect server-side transactional or subscription email through an official provider contract.
userExamples: Connect the approved provider for booking emails.

intents.label: Add workflow automation
intents.description: Automate a bounded business workflow with observable triggers and failure handling.
userExamples: After a paid booking, notify the advisor and update the customer.

intents.label: Add transactional email
intents.description: Add event-driven email templates with safe data handling and delivery states.
userExamples: Send confirmations when customers book or cancel.

intents.label: Configure integration consent
intents.description: Add explicit consent and preference handling around external data sharing.
userExamples: Ask permission before syncing newsletter details.

intents.label: Diagnose build failure
intents.description: Find the root cause of a generated-site build failure and identify a bounded repair.
userExamples: Diagnose the current build error without changing unrelated files.

intents.label: Fix broken page
intents.description: Diagnose and repair a broken route or page while preserving generated-site contracts.
userExamples: Fix the product page that returns an error.

intents.label: Repair data migration
intents.description: Diagnose and repair a D1 migration without discarding valid project data.
userExamples: Fix the migration that fails on existing customer rows.

intents.label: Verify data integrity
intents.description: Verify stored generated-site data and invariants after a risky change.
userExamples: Verify order totals and wallet entries after the migration.

intents.label: Fix auth access
intents.description: Diagnose account, session, or protected-route access without weakening authorization.
userExamples: Fix signed-in customers being redirected from order history.

intents.label: Audit admin permissions
intents.description: Audit generated admin SSO, roles, permissions, and security-relevant actions.
userExamples: Verify advisors cannot access owner-only settings.

intents.label: Improve site performance
intents.description: Diagnose and improve loading, rendering, and interaction performance with measured evidence.
userExamples: Improve mobile performance on the product listing.

intents.label: Verify release readiness
intents.description: Verify code, configuration, secrets status, and user-visible failure states before release.
userExamples: Check whether this generated site is ready to release.

internalSkills.purpose: Locate the generated-site architecture, route ownership, and bounded change surface before editing.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Discovers and routes work; it does not define public taxonomy or own feature implementation.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement coherent Astro UI, layout, theming, and component-system changes.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns presentation patterns, not brand content, routing, or vertical business logic.

internalSkills.purpose: Apply responsive, accessible, reduced-motion, and measured frontend-performance practices.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns cross-cutting user-interface quality, not feature-specific workflows.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement site navigation, public route relationships, and search experiences.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns navigation and search behavior, not content authoring or deployment routing.

internalSkills.purpose: Edit governed content and operate the existing EmDash-backed content release lifecycle.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns content operations through EmDash, not code-release or skill-release publication.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement locale-aware content, routes, fallbacks, and lifecycle behavior.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns localization mechanics, not translation truth or brand voice.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement accurate search, answer-engine, metadata, sitemap, and structured-data improvements.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns discoverability signals and validation; it must not invent business or domain claims.

internalSkills.purpose: Use governed project assets, manifests, R2 storage, and project-assets tooling safely.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns asset lifecycle and references, not generative-media aesthetics.

internalSkills.purpose: Create, transform, and optimize visual media for accessible responsive delivery.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns media production and optimization, while storage remains with project assets.

internalSkills.purpose: Build validated accessible forms, lead capture, and newsletter signup flows.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns form and lead semantics; external vendor contracts belong to integration skills.

internalSkills.purpose: Define privacy-aware analytics events, funnels, and business insight views.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns measurement definitions and presentation, not consent policy or vendor credentials.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement product catalogs, product pages, pricing presentation, and merchandising structures.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns merchandise data and presentation, not cart, payment, or fulfillment state.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement cart, wishlist, order history, and fulfillment state workflows.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns commerce state after catalog selection; payment-provider contracts are separate.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement checkout, server-side payment boundaries, and payment webhook processing.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns payment lifecycle correctness, not generic vendor research or secret storage.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement service listings, booking journeys, schedules, capacity, and availability.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns bookable service behavior, not advisor marketplace identity or payment processing.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement advisor discovery and protected advisor/customer marketplace portals.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns marketplace and portal workflows while delegating auth and booking primitives.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement customer identity, sessions, account data, and privacy controls.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns customer-facing identity and privacy, not generated admin authorization.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement account-scoped wallet, messaging, and community interaction patterns.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns interactive account features, not payment settlement or general authentication.

internalSkills.purpose: Translate inspected AstrologyAPI contracts into server-side generated-site provider adapters.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns provider contract and secret-safe adapter behavior, not domain presentation or unsupported claims.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement chart, transit, synastry, and compatibility domain experiences.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns this astrology domain family; provider transport stays in the adapter skill.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement horoscope, Panchang, numerology, and tarot domain experiences.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns divination and calendar presentation without claiming unverified provider accuracy.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement persisted astrology reports and data-grounded conversational explanations.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns report and conversational experience, not raw provider integration or general community chat.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement integration orchestration, webhook lifecycle, automation, and consent handling.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns integration mechanics; unknown vendor discovery and credential readiness are separate.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement event-driven customer notifications and maintainable message templates.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns transactional messaging semantics, not marketing content or provider research.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement runtime configuration, secret declarations, safe previews, Setup cards, and provider readiness states.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns configuration and readiness without reading secret values or owning vendor business logic.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement safe D1 schema evolution, persistence invariants, and integrity checks.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns generated-site data integrity, not Control Plane release database changes.

internalSkills.purpose: Implement generated-site admin SSO, role-based access, and auditable privileged actions.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns generated-site administration, not the Builder Skills release-operations Admin.

internalSkills.purpose: Diagnose root causes and verify changes with proportionate tests and observable evidence.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns investigation and verification across domains; it does not replace domain implementation skills.

internalSkills.purpose: Research current official vendor documentation and bound unsupported integration implementation.
internalSkills.boundarySummary: Owns official-document research and unsupported-state decisions, not credentials or generic web research for unrelated work.
